def negative_python_perf_layer_async_concurrency_asyncio_task_per_item_unbounded():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_async_concurrency_asyncio_task_per_item_unbounded"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Async and concurrency. Flag unbounded create_task fanout without a semaphore, queue, or batch limit."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
